channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: AI agent forms its own company, gets ready to trade crypto
item.description: Although Manfred will not start trading crypto until the end of May, it already has a crypto wallet and credentials to hire staff, make payments and do business....

item.title: Someone just drained long-forgotten dormant Ethereum wallets, and the cause may trace back years

item.title: VECT Ransomware is a Wiper, Not Ransomware — Don’t Bother Paying, Says Check Point Research

item.title: Almost one year after discovery, Sandhills Medical Foundation notifies 169,017 people affected by a cyberattack
item.description: On April 28, Sandhills Medical Foundation in South Carolina notified the Maine Attorney General’s Office of a data breach that affected a total of 169,017 people, only 8 of whom are Maine residents. T...
